name: apps-for-x
description: Apps for X – Multi-account X (Twitter) desktop client with productivity tools
author: Apps for X

scripts.build:pkg: rm -rf release/mas-universal && rm -f release/*.pkg && CSC_INSTALLER_LINK="./developers-installer.p12" CSC_INSTALLER_KEY_PASSWORD="Mondialu13" npm run build && (electron-builder --mac mas --universal --config.mas.type=distribution || true) && codesign --force --sign "Apple Distribution: Mihai Graure (L284ZYR49L)" --entitlements "build/entitlements.mas.loginhelper.plist" "release/mas-universal/Apps for X.app/Contents/Library/LoginItems/Apps for X Login Helper.app/Contents/MacOS/Apps for X Login Helper" && productbuild --component "release/mas-universal/Apps for X.app" /Applications --sign "3rd Party Mac Developer Installer: Mihai Graure (L284ZYR49L)" "release/Apps for X.pkg"
scripts.build:all: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg mas
